title: Expressions like (a IS NULL AND b = ?) optimized by a UNIQUE index matching a single row only
poc: create table t(x, y, unique(x, y));
select * from t where x is null and y = 1;
key_bug_features: UNIQUE index optimization on NULL and equality condition
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t(x INTEGER, y INTEGER, UNIQUE(x, y));
SELECT * FROM t WHERE x IS NULL AND y = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t WHERE x IS NULL OR y = 1;
